text:
(a) The department shall issue specialty license plates for persons who have received the Legion of Merit medal. The license plates must include the words “Legion of Merit.”

(b) Repealed by Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1296, Sec. 247(10), eff. January 1, 2012.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 504. License Plates
##### § 504.316 — Legion of Merit Medal Recipients

(a) The department shall issue specialty license plates for persons who have received the Legion of Merit medal. The license plates must include the words “Legion of Merit.”

(b) Repealed by Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1296, Sec. 247(10), eff. January 1, 2012.

*Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1296 (H.B.2357), Sec. 247(10), eff. January 1, 2012.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: The department shall issue specialty license plates for persons who have received the Legion of Merit medal. The license plates must include the words “Legion of Merit.”

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: Repealed by Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1296, Sec. 247(10), eff. January 1, 2012.
